steps.title: Convert 20% to a simplified fraction
steps.content: Express 20% as a fraction: $$20\% = \frac{20}{100}$$. Simplify by dividing numerator and denominator by 20: $$\frac{20}{100} = \frac{1}{5}$$

steps.title: Calculate the number of green buttons
steps.content: Find 1/5 of 330 by dividing: $$330 \div 5 = 66$$. There are 66 green buttons in the jar.
